---
name: New properties
about: To propose new soil properties for SoilVoc.
title: "[new-properties]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''
type: Feature

---

- **prefLabel**: The preferred label of the property concept.
- **altLabel (optional)**: The alternative label (synonyms) of the property concept.
- **definition**: The definition of the property concept.
- **defintionLink**: The link to the source of the definition.
- **exactMatch (optional)**: The same concept from other vocabularies. Use the URI.
- **closeMatch (optional)**: The similar concept from other vocabularies. Use the URI.

If there are multiple altLabel, definition, definitionLink, exactMatch or closeMatch, use semi column to separate them.


| prefLabel | altLabel | definition | definitionLink | exactMatch | closeMatch |
|----------|----------|------------|-------------|----------------|--------------------|
|          |          |            |             |                |                |       
|          |          |            |             |                |                |    
|          |          |            |             |                |                |
